programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Beaufort, North Carolina Beach House Remodel
programs.desc: Hoping to create memories, a couple from Durham is searching for a Beaufort, NC beach home to share with family and rent out. But with access to fishing, boating, and beautiful beaches driving up prices, their dream depends on finding an affordable fixer.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, Texas includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programs.desc: Tired of Denver cold, a family finds a place in Cocoa Beach, Fla., but they want to add a poolside oasis and custom spa.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.sub_title: Saving More Than Logs in Bulls Gap, TN
programs.desc: Mark and the guys go the extra mile to save antique logs from a Tennessee home in distress; they meet Larry, who grew up in the log cabin with no running water; in the end, Mark makes him a one-of-a-kind barn-wood memento of his childhood home.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.sub_title: Barnwood Gold Mine in the Keystone State
programs.desc: Mark finds a perfectly preserved bank barn in Pennsylvania; the beams are so nice, he considers keeping this barn for himself; he also visits a bank barn that has been transformed into a high-end home with barn-wood flooring and soapstone counters.

programs.title: Second Chance Stage
programs.desc: Having overcome life-altering setbacks, five talented acts take the stage, including a musical duo, dancer, singer, comedian and opera hopeful.
